untranslatable_reason: Signal requires 52-week high (high_52w) which is not in the allowed indicators list. The signal logic depends on comparing current price to a 52-week rolling high value, which cannot be expressed using only the provided indicators (sma_5 through sma_200, ema variants, RSI, ATR, Bollinger Bands, MACD, ADX, Stochastic, Donchian, Pivots, Volume, and Bar Properties). Donchian channels (dc_upper) only provide the highest price over a specified lookback period (typically 20 bars), not 252 trading days (52 weeks).
translation_notes: The signal requires tracking a 52-week high value which is a custom lookback indicator not available in the allowed set. While dc_upper could approximate recent highs, it does not capture the full 52-week (252 trading day) horizon specified in the original rule. A proper translation would require a high_52w or equivalent 252-bar lookback indicator.
